title: A Star Is Born
review_summary: The reviewer enjoyed Judy Garland’s '76 Barbra Streisand version for its realism over Joan Crawford's '54 classic but notes it lacks recognition despite better acting and plot.

title: The Garden of Allah
review_summary: Marlene Dietrich's performance shines, but overall it's an empty film with poorly executed editing despite stunning visuals; missing John Gilbert would've been better.

title: The Groove Tube
review_summary: "The Groove Tube," an extremely unfunny and poorly executed comedy, stands out only due to a brief "dancing man" sequence amidst overwhelmingly negative reception; it's worse than many infamous SNL skits or films like Plan 9 or Robot Monster.
